name: collect_skills
description: Extract and structure the founder's professional skills from free-text input. Call this first in the Founder Discovery Flow to understand what the founder is good at. Expects the founder's natural-language response about their skills and talents.

response.description: The founder's natural-language response about their skills and talents.

prior_skills.description: Previously collected skills to merge with or refine.

items.description: Structured skill items extracted from the response.

summary.description: A brief narrative summary of the founder's skill profile.
